top3.sql:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, m.position
FROM member m
JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
WHERE z.city = 'Lincolnton' AND z.state = 'North Carolina' AND z.zip_code = '28092';
